from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import *

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace: {workspace}")

csv_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net/MPESC-SPREADSHEET/EXTRACT"
temp_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net/MPESC-SPREADSHEET/TEMP"

print(f"workspace       : {workspace}")
print(f"storage account : {storage_account_name}")
print(f"base path       : {csv_base_path}")

inspector_path = f"{csv_base_path}/Inspector.csv"
case_path = f"{csv_base_path}/Case.csv"

print(f"reading Inspector : {inspector_path}")
print(f"reading Case      : {case_path}")

inspector_df = spark.read.option("header", "true").csv(inspector_path)
case_df = spark.read.option("header", "true").csv(case_path)

print(f"Inspector rows : {inspector_df.count():,}")
print(f"Case rows      : {case_df.count():,}")

# check for missing inspectorAllocatedDate
total_inspectors = inspector_df.count()

missing_dates = inspector_df.filter(
    (F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate").isNull()) |
    (F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate") == "") |
    (F.trim(F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate")) == "")
).count()

print(f"Total Inspector records : {total_inspectors:,}")
print(f"Missing allocated dates : {missing_dates:,}")

if missing_dates == 0:
    print("No missing dates found - no processing needed")
else:
    print(f"Need to map {missing_dates:,} missing dates from Case.csv")

# build case lookup table
case_lookup = (
    case_df
    .select("id", "createdDate")
    .withColumnRenamed("id", "caseId")
    .withColumnRenamed("createdDate", "case_createdDate")
)

print(f"case lookup records: {case_lookup.count():,}")

missing_created_dates = case_lookup.filter(
    (F.col("case_createdDate").isNull()) |
    (F.col("case_createdDate") == "") |
    (F.trim(F.col("case_createdDate")) == "")
).count()

print(f"cases with missing createdDate: {missing_created_dates:,}")

# map missing dates
inspector_with_mapping = inspector_df.join(case_lookup, "caseId", "left")

inspector_updated = inspector_with_mapping.withColumn(
    "inspectorAllocatedDate",
    F.when(
        (F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate").isNull()) |
        (F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate") == "") |
        (F.trim(F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate")) == ""),
        F.col("case_createdDate")
    ).otherwise(F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate"))
)

final_inspector_df = inspector_updated.select(
    "id",
    "inspectorId",
    "inspectorAllocatedDate",
    "caseId"
)

print("Mapping completed successfully")
print(f"Final Inspector records: {final_inspector_df.count():,}")

still_missing = final_inspector_df.filter(
    (F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate").isNull()) |
    (F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate") == "") |
    (F.trim(F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate")) == "")
).count()

mapped_count = missing_dates - still_missing

print(f"originally missing dates : {missing_dates:,}")
print(f"successfully mapped      : {mapped_count:,}")
print(f"still missing            : {still_missing:,}")

if still_missing > 0:
    print(f"{still_missing:,} records could not be mapped")
    final_inspector_df.filter(
        (F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate").isNull()) |
        (F.col("inspectorAllocatedDate") == "")
    ).show(5, truncate=False)

if mapped_count > 0:
    print("Writing updated Inspector.csv...")

    temp_output_path = f"{temp_path}/Inspector_updated"

    final_inspector_df.coalesce(1) \
        .write.mode("overwrite") \
        .option("header", "true") \
        .csv(temp_output_path)

    original_inspector_path = f"{csv_base_path}/Inspector.csv"

    try:
        mssparkutils.fs.rm(original_inspector_path, True)
        print("removed original Inspector.csv")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"could nt remove original file: {e}")

    temp_files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(temp_output_path)
    part_file = [f.path for f in temp_files if "part-" in f.name][0]

    mssparkutils.fs.cp(part_file, original_inspector_path)

    mssparkutils.fs.rm(temp_output_path, True)

    print(f"Completed - {mapped_count:,} record(s) updated")
    print(f"File updated: {original_inspector_path}")
else:
    print("No updates neccessary.")
